title: Candy PvP Pack
description: A texturepack with smooth candy-like gradients, designed for Pot PVP and NethPot PVP fully working on 1.21.x.
body:
# 🍬 Candy - PvP Pack for Pot & NethPot
## Smooth. Clean. Deadly.
Candy is a high-performance PvP texture pack built for Pot PvP and NethPot PvP, featuring candy-like gradients and buttery-smooth visuals designed for aesthetics.

## ✨ Features:
🍭 Smooth, candy-style gradients on swords, pots, armor, and more

⚔️ Optimized for Pot PvP & NethPot PvP gamemodes

🔥 Fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21.x

###
